name: tokenfly
description: A lightweight npm package and CLI to estimate prompt token usage and costs.

scripts.build: tsup --config tsup.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const file='dist/bin.js';const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8').replace(/^#!\/usr\/bin\/env node\n+/,'');fs.writeFileSync(file,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+content);"
